footer.tagline: Supporting students & families on their journey to success abroad.
footer.designer: Designed with care for future global students 🌍

founders.title: Founders’ Message
founders.quote: "As parents, we understand that sending your child to study abroad is not just an academic decision—it is an emotional one."
founders.para1: We have lived this journey ourselves. We have faced the stress of paperwork, visas, residency permits, housing, and medical insurance. We have felt the anxiety of navigating an unfamiliar system while wanting only one thing: to secure the best future for our children.
founders.para2_bold: This is why we created this company.
founders.para3: What once felt overwhelming for our own families became the reason we chose to support yours. Our mission is to stand beside parents and students, simplifying every step of the journey to studying in France, with care, transparency, and responsibility.
founders.para4_start: We do not see students as files or applications.
founders.para4_orange: We see them as children entrusted to us by their parents—just as ours once were.
founders.footer_title: You are not alone in this journey.
founders.footer_text: We are here, as professionals, and above all, as parents.

about_hero.title: About us
about_hero.description: We know that sending your child to study in another country is a big decision, full of excitement, but also uncertainty.
about_hero.highlight: At EduSteps2Europe, we give families peace of mind and students the support they need to thrive in France.

about_mission.title: Our mission is to empower international students
about_mission.para1: By providing the guidance, resources, and local support they need to confidently pursue their education in France.
about_mission.para2: We aim to simplify every step of the process—from selecting the right university to adjusting to life abroad—ensuring a smooth transition and a successful first year.

about_question.description_1: Our alumni ambassadors are students just like your child — from your region, studying in France now. They’ve gone through the same application steps, moved abroad, and are building their future.
about_question.description_2: Ask them what it's really like — housing, classes, choosing a city, making friends, anything.
about_question.button_text: Book a call with an EDUSTEPS2EUROPE alumni
about_question.whatsapp_message: Hello, I want to book a call with an alumni

v1.title: Student-Centric
v1.description: We place students at the heart of everything we do—listening, understanding, and responding to their unique needs and dreams.

v2.title: Trust & Transparency
v2.description: We believe in honest advice, clear processes, and open communication every step of the way.

v3.title: Expertise with Empathy
v3.description: Our team combines professional knowledge with personal experience, providing guidance that is both accurate and heartfelt.

v4.title: Local Support, Global Reach
v4.description: We bridge the gap between your home country and France with on-the-ground assistance and international understanding.

v5.title: Commitment to Success
v5.description: We don’t just help you get to France—we stay by your side to make sure your first year is stable, secure, and full of potential.

v6.title: Adaptability & Growth
v6.description: We continuously improve our services based on feedback, changing needs, and the evolving student experience.

about_vision.description: And become the most trusted, student-focused support platform for international students in France. We aim to make studying abroad a well-guided, stress-free, and rewarding journey. By offering personalized resources, expert guidance, and a supportive community, we empower students to thrive academically and personally in their new environment.
